candidate.completion: stop counting customer support chats as human connection.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please stop counting customer support chats as human connection.

evaluation.rationale: Sharp premise reversal and an exact social target give it real bite. The line is fresh and truthful, but the phrasing is slightly long and more pointed than graceful.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
